summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Market-Based Pricing APIs and Frontend. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend ExtranetPricing page works correctly with market selection, price types, and bulk update functionality.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/markets returns 200 with 20 markets
Backend: GET /api/markets has correct market codes (TR, DE, GB, FR, NL, BE, RU, UA, PL, US, CA, AU, IT, ES, AT, CH, SE, NO, DK, SA)
Backend: GET /api/markets has correct currencies for each market
Backend: GET /api/markets has required fields (code, name, currency, flag)
Backend: GET /api/exchange-rates returns 200 with rates dictionary
Backend: GET /api/exchange-rates has TRY as base currency (rate = 1.0)
Backend: GET /api/exchange-rates has all 14 expected currencies
Backend: GET /api/exchange-rates indicates source (default/custom)
Backend: GET /api/convert-price returns 200 for TRY to EUR conversion
Backend: GET /api/convert-price correctly converts 1000 TRY to EUR
Backend: GET /api/convert-price returns same amount for same currency
Backend: GET /api/convert-price works for EUR to USD conversion
Backend: GET /api/convert-price works for all supported currencies
Backend: POST /api/market-pricing requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/market-pricing creates pricing for single market
Backend: POST /api/market-pricing/bulk updates multiple markets
Backend: GET /api/market-pricing/{room_id} returns market-specific pricing
Backend: GET /api/market-pricing/{room_id}/all-markets returns pricing for all markets
Backend: PUT /api/exchange-rates requires admin role (403 for hotel owner)
Backend: PUT /api/exchange-rates allows admin to update rates
Backend: Updated exchange rates are persisted
Backend: POST /api/market-pricing returns 404 for invalid room
Backend: POST /api/market-pricing/bulk works with weekends only filter
Backend: POST /api/market-pricing/bulk works with weekdays only filter
Frontend: ExtranetPricing page loads with room selection
Frontend: Rate plan selection works correctly
Frontend: Price Types section shows Market Prices, Local (TR), Corporate, Dynamic Package
Frontend: Market selection dialog shows all 20 markets with flags
Frontend: Market selection updates header and Selected Market section
Frontend: Bulk Update dialog opens with date range, apply to options, price types
Frontend: Calendar displays pricing data for selected dates
action_items: Minor: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility compliance

features: Returns 20 markets with correct codes
Each market has code, name, currency, flag
Currencies match expected values (TR=TRY, DE=EUR, GB=GBP, etc.)
Returns rates dictionary with TRY as base (1.0)
Supports 14 currencies: TRY, EUR, USD, GBP, RUB, SAR, AUD, CAD, CHF, SEK, NOK, DKK, PLN, UAH
Indicates source (default or custom)
Converts between any supported currencies
Uses TRY as base for conversion
Returns original, converted, from_currency, to_currency
Single market pricing update with date, price, available_units, min_stay, stop_sale
Bulk update for multiple markets with date range and apply_to filter (all/weekdays/weekends)
Get pricing for specific market
Get pricing for all markets grouped by market_code
Admin-only endpoint (403 for non-admin)
Updates rates in database
Persisted rates returned in subsequent GET
Room selection with 3 rooms displayed
Rate plan selection with pricing info
Price Types: Market Prices, Local (TR), Corporate, Dynamic Package
Market selection dialog with 20 countries and flags
Selected market displayed in header and sidebar
Bulk Update dialog with date range, apply_to options, price inputs
Calendar view with pricing data

seed_data_creation: Test data created: room_e45010e669a5, rate_plan rp_00b146e13945 with prices for TR (2500 TRY), DE (85 EUR), GB (72 GBP), US (90 USD)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Market-based pricing with 20 country support is fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/markets, /api/exchange-rates, /api/convert-price, /api/market-pricing work correctly. Frontend ExtranetPricing page at /extranet/pricing/{hotelId} displays market selection, price types, and bulk update functionality. Exchange rates use TRY as base currency. Admin can update exchange rates via PUT /api/exchange-rates.
